entities.id: Inverse kth maximization combinatorial optimization problem
entities.description: A problem involving modifying element weights so a specific subset becomes the kth best solution with minimum cost.
A metric used in optimization to measure the maximum difference between elements.
A measure of the number of positions at which the corresponding symbols are different.
Algorithms developed to solve the problem with a sum objective function.
Used within the developed algorithms to find optimal values in linear or logarithmic time.
A specific algorithm used to find optimal values in linear time for max functions.
Methodology to solve the sum objective function version.
Methodology to solve the max objective function version.
Computational complexity for solving the problem with sum objective function.
Computational complexity for solving the problem with max objective function.
